title: Implementation lugs must declare model level; default Haiku; decompose until Haiku-executable
summary: Task/bug/feature lugs must include a 'model' field (haiku | sonnet | opus). Default is haiku. Escalation to sonnet/opus requires explicit model_rationale. Before dispatch, lugs go through an improve pass at the same model level — not a higher one. A lug is Haiku-executable when: scope is 1-2 files, perceive steps are read-specific-paths, execute steps are change-specific-functions, and verify is a deterministic command. The improve step must validate this before the sub-agent is launched.
rule: Lugs declare model level. Haiku is default. Improve before dispatch. Test with same model.
why_it_matters: Sub-agents inherited Sonnet by default because lugs had no model field. Mario's expectation is Haiku-first. This pattern applies to every spoke with sub-agent dispatch — it is a universal quality gate, not a per-spoke preference.
applies_to: All spokes that dispatch implementation sub-agents
